texto: Travel is an evolving experience. It doesn't take place in photographs or your past... Instead it's tucked up there in your memory and when you need a bit of it, or a new perspective on something hidden within it, it will emerge into your conscious mind
explicacao: Citação de Dan Kieran sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Travel is an evolving experience. It doesn't take place in photographs or your past... Instead it…” articula reflexao, memory, travel em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e travel.
